leadText: The Go-Goggles (Japanese: ゴーゴーゴーグル Go-Go Goggle) are a Key Item in the Hoenn-based Generation III and Generation VI games.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Passive effect [ edit | edit source ] Allows the player to pass through Route 111 's harsh sandstorm , allowing them to obtain a Root Fossil or Claw Fossil from the northeast part of desert R S OR AS / Mirage Tower E , which can be revived into Lileep or Anorith , respectively, at the Devon Corporation in Rustboro City . Without them, when the player tries to enter the desert , the following messages appear and the player will be turned away: "The sandstorm is vicious. It's impossible to keep going." R S E "The sandstorm is too harsh!" OR AS

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description R S E Nifty goggles that protect eyes from desert sandstorms. FR LG A pair of protective goggles. They enable a Trainer to travel through even desert sandstorms. OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V Nifty goggles to protect eyes from desert sandstorms.

Without them, when the player tries to enter the desert , the following messages appear and the player will be turned away: "The sandstorm is vicious. It's impossible to keep going." sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] In Pokémon Black and White , a Backpacker references this item, saying he doesn't need them in the Desert Resort . In Generation VII , a Hiker mentions needing them in Haina Desert . In Generation III , several NPCs in the desert mention wearing Go-Goggles. This is no longer the case in Generation VI , where the same characters now mention how the sandstorm is hurting their eyes due to their lack of Go-Goggles.
